name: Baked Apples with Raisins
recipeInstructions:
1 Peel and core the apples. Coat the outer surface with orange juice.
2 Stuff each apple generously with raisins. Sprinkle a pinch of cinnamon on top.
3 Place the stuffed apples in Pyrex baking cups. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a fork pierces the apple easily.
4 Serve warm or cold.
